## Checklist

- [ ] The change is limited to the stated scope and preserves unrelated work.
- [ ] Tests and repository checks pass, or exceptions are explained above.
- [ ] Documentation reflects implemented behavior and labels future work as proposed.
- [ ] No source data, derived patient-level data, credentials, or generated artifacts were added.
- [ ] Dataset DOI, license, citations, and research/educational limitations remain visible where relevant.
- [ ] Historical results remain identified as historical and are not presented as unseen-patient generalization.
- [ ] The change makes no medical, clinical, diagnostic, or production-healthcare claims.
- [ ] Pipeline, model, dataset, evaluation, CI, and repository-setting impacts are explicitly disclosed.
